context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the generate-api-collection instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: you MUST also create or update the corresponding API collection file so the

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: flow can be tested. Do not leave the collection missing or outdated.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Each request MUST include a description and at least one basic test script (e.g. status code check).

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Verify the collection can be imported into a compatible API client (e.g. Postman) without errors.
